title: moly speciosum
intro: Moly speciosum, also known as the Jacob's Ladder, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Its health benefits include the ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Moly speciosum can be consumed as a tea or infusion, or used topically as a poultice to relieve pain and inflammation.
